name: 𝚂𝚝𝚛𝚎𝚜𝚜𝚒𝚗𝚐 || Germany CH
description:
IM NOT OVER WORKING MYSELF!

Oh no! - by Maria and the diamonds

Germany is sure a tough nut to crack but will that lead to his down fall of constantly working and working until he breaks? Somebody had to help him, get better and will that someone be you?

ARTIST NOT FOUND: PINTEREST ★
